general.name: Restrictions Allow Airdrop Erase Install
general.description: Allow Airdrop + Allow Erase and Install
general.payloads: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><!DOCTYPE plist PUBLIC "-//Apple//DTD PLIST 1.0//EN" "http://www.apple.com/DTDs/PropertyList-1.0.dtd"> <plist version="1"><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>2F59FA6D-8B76-410C-BBA2-7551F5FCC158</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>Configuration</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>2F59FA6D-8B76-410C-BBA2-7551F5FCC158</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Restrictions Allow Airdrop Erase Install</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string>Allow Airdrop + Allow Erase and Install</string><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>PayloadRemovalDisallowed</key><true/><key>PayloadScope</key><string>System</string><key>PayloadContent</key><array><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>544619AE-8097-4E53-9CB2-B027959C2147</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.MCX</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>544619AE-8097-4E53-9CB2-B027959C2147</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>MCX</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>safariAllowAutoFill</key><true/></dict><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>5398EF1E-A49A-44F8-B7D3-18CB9FD23ED5</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.applicationaccess.new</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>5398EF1E-A49A-44F8-B7D3-18CB9FD23ED5</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Application Access: Disc Recording</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>BurnSupport</key><string>on</string></dict><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>9E969BD8-E497-4CB9-ACDF-DF542B04DBB1</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.appstore</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>9E969BD8-E497-4CB9-ACDF-DF542B04DBB1</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>App Access: Finder Settings</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>ProhibitBurn</key><false/></dict><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>2E343F0F-5098-4CDA-B986-185EB7DDDA02</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.gamed</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>2E343F0F-5098-4CDA-B986-185EB7DDDA02</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Game Center</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>GKFeatureGameCenterAllowed</key><false/><key>GKFeatureAccountModificationAllowed</key><true/><key>GKFeatureAddingGameCenterFriendsAllowed</key><true/><key>GKFeatureMultiplayerGamingAllowed</key><true/></dict><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>42BD9B0D-7CCE-4B83-9B33-3A40551AB932</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.applicationaccess</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>42BD9B0D-7CCE-4B83-9B33-3A40551AB932</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Restrictions</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>forceUnpromptedManagedClassroomScreenObservation</key><false/><key>allowCloudDocumentSync</key><false/><key>allowCloudDesktopAndDocuments</key><false/><key>allowSpotlightInternetResults</key><true/><key>allowMusicService</key><true/><key>allowCloudKeychainSync</key><false/><key>allowCloudBTMM</key><false/><key>allowCloudFMM</key><false/><key>allowCloudBookmarks</key><true/><key>allowCloudMail</key><true/><key>allowCloudCalendar</key><true/><key>allowCloudReminders</key><true/><key>allowCloudAddressBook</key><true/><key>allowCloudNotes</key><true/><key>allowPasswordSharing</key><true/><key>allowPasswordAutoFill</key><true/><key>allowPasswordProximityRequests</key><true/><key>allowCamera</key><true/><key>allowContentCaching</key><true/><key>allowCloudPrivateRelay</key><true/><key>allowUniversalControl</key><true/><key>allowAirDrop</key><true/><key>allowRapidSecurityResponseInstallation</key><true/><key>allowRapidSecurityResponseRemoval</key><true/><key>allowUIConfigurationProfileInstallation</key><true/><key>allowUSBRestrictedMode</key><true/><key>allowCloudFreeform</key><true/><key>allowLocalUserCreation</key><true/><key>allowStartupDiskModification</key><true/><key>allowTimeMachineBackup</key><true/><key>allowARDRemoteManagementModification</key><true/><key>allowBluetoothSharingModification</key><true/><key>allowFileSharingModification</key><true/><key>allowInternetSharingModification</key><true/><key>allowPrinterSharingModification</key><true/><key>allowRemoteAppleEventsModification</key><true/><key>allowAccountModification</key><true/><key>allowDeviceNameModification</key><true/><key>allowAssistant</key><true/><key>allowFingerprintModification</key><true/><key>allowCloudPhotoLibrary</key><true/><key>allowGenmoji</key><false/><key>allowImagePlayground</key><false/><key>allowiPhoneMirroring</key><false/><key>allowWritingTools</key><false/><key>forceBypassScreenCaptureAlert</key><false/><key>allowMailSummary</key><true/><key>allowMediaSharingModification</key><true/><key>allowExternalIntelligenceIntegrations</key><true/><key>allowExternalIntelligenceIntegrationsSignIn</key><true/><key>allowNotesTranscriptionSummary</key><true/><key>allowAppleIntelligenceReport</key><true/><key>allowMailSmartReplies</key><true/><key>allowSafariSummary</key><true/><key>allowNotesTranscription</key><true/><key>allowSafariHistoryClearing</key><true/><key>allowSafariPrivateBrowsing</key><true/><key>forceDelayedSoftwareUpdates</key><false/><key>forceDelayedAppSoftwareUpdates</key><false/><key>forceDelayedMajorSoftwareUpdates</key><false/><key>allowAirPrint</key><true/><key>forceAirPrintTrustedTLSRequirement</key><false/><key>allowAirPrintiBeaconDiscovery</key><true/><key>allowScreenShot</key><true/><key>allowRemoteScreenObservation</key><true/><key>forceClassroomUnpromptedScreenObservation</key><false/><key>forceUnpromptedManagedClassroomScreenObservation</key><false/><key>allowFingerprintForUnlock</key><true/><key>enforcedFingerprintTimeout</key><integer>172800</integer><key>forceClassroomUnpromptedAppAndDeviceLock</key><false/><key>forceClassroomAutomaticallyJoinClasses</key><false/><key>forceClassroomRequestPermissionToLeaveClasses</key><false/><key>allowEraseContentAndSettings</key><true/></dict><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>BD9BF15E-E917-4064-96EB-393387EC22BC</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.systempreferences</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>BD9BF15E-E917-4064-96EB-393387EC22BC</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>System Preferences</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>DisabledPreferencePanes</key><array><string>com.apple.preferences.appstore</string><string>com.apple.preference.digihub.discs</string><string>com.apple.ClassroomSettings</string><string>com.apple.preferences.FamilySharingPrefPane</string><string>com.apple.prefpanel.fibrechannel</string><string>com.apple.preference.ink</string><string>com.apple.preference.internet</string><string>com.apple.preferences.parentalcontrols</string><string>com.apple.Xsan</string></array></dict><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>F9421699-06C6-4DEE-ABDE-164D03AE3751</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.preferences.users</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>F9421699-06C6-4DEE-ABDE-164D03AE3751</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>User Access</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>logout-eject</key><dict/><key>mount-controls</key><dict><key>cd</key><array><string>eject</string><string>alert</string></array><key>harddisk-internal</key><array/><key>disk-image</key><array/><key>dvd</key><array><string>eject</string><string>alert</string></array><key>blankdvd</key><array><string>eject</string><string>alert</string></array><key>harddisk-external</key><array><string>read-only</string></array><key>blankcd</key><array><string>eject</string><string>alert</string></array><key>dvdram</key><array><string>eject</string><string>alert</string></array></dict></dict><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>8213C6FC-3368-4C2E-8397-3EBDBC149109</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.desktop</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>8213C6FC-3368-4C2E-8397-3EBDBC149109</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Desktop</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>override-picture-path</key><string>/Users/Shared/Saks.jpg</string></dict><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>1258170C-C98F-4285-85A5-6B48FADCDA64</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.ShareKitHelper</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>1258170C-C98F-4285-85A5-6B48FADCDA64</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Restrictions</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>SHKAllowedShareServices</key><array><string>com.apple.share.AirDrop</string><string>com.apple.reminders.RemindersShareExtension</string><string>com.apple.Notes.SharingExtension</string><string>com.apple.share.Messages</string></array></dict></array></dict></plist>
